name: Charlie Pagnard
body: Sending Love! Continuing to pray for God's healing!!

name: Craig and Lisa Dotson
body: Over 20 years ago our family was blessed to have a young music teacher become a part of our lives. Some time later we had the privilege of meeting the lovely young lady who would become is wife! Lee and Kayla, we love you both dearly and continue to pray for you both, your children and for strength and faith to continue to walk through this valley that could drive the strongest of men to utter despair. May rays of God’s light, through this dark time, give hope to your souls and peace in the knowledge of how much you are loved.

name: Stephanie Heston
body: Your faithfulness continues to be an inspiration. Keeping you all in thoughts & prayers.

name: Barb Shewan
body: Cannot imagine all you go through every minute of the day. God is faithful...we see it in your words. Praying for all you asked, and especially His peace that passes understanding.

name: Judy Nichols
body: My heart aches for you, gut-wrenching aching. God, be glorified in this.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Heartbroken with you. No words are adequate. Just continuing to pray for God to surround you all in new and bigger ways than ever before.

name: Julie Hickman
body: Lee and KaylaI am so sorry that you were facing this trial. Remember that God is near to the brokenhearted. Psalms 34:18

name: DeShanna Kennard
body: I am at a loss of words. My heart breaks for y'all. Praying to the Lord, the Great Physician, the Healer and Sustainer, the Faithful God of mercy for Lyla.

name: Graham Geisler
body: Oh, Lee. My heart aches for you all. Anything I say will come across as irrelevant compared to what you have shared. You are in my prayers. I have thought lately about how your story is an echo of Job's story in many ways. May God be glorified.

name: Mills Nicole
body: Oh Lee, I don't know what to say, other than I'm you so sorry and you all are in my thoughts and prayers. Give Lyla a big hug from me.

name: Jim Powers
body: There are no words to accurately convey the thoughts that I am attempting to pray. May The Holy Spirit speak on my behalf and lift all of you up. I pray God provides the courage, strength, and wisdom for decisions in coming days. Father, please wrap this entire family in your precious constant Love. May your hands guide surgeons and all those involved to perform with exceptional skill, and care. And Father, I ask that you are glorified through this, and demonstrate YOUR Power through it all. I lift up the Klopfenstein family, and just ask that you Love on them in ways only you can. Amen!
